name: Mabl
description: Monitor Mabl AI-powered testing for automated test coverage and code quality compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to mabl at https://app.mabl.com
2. Go to Settings > API > API Keys
3. Generate a new API key
4. Enter "key" as the Username and paste the API key below

credentialFields.label: Username
credentialFields.helpText: Enter "key" (literal text). mabl uses the word "key" as the Basic auth username.

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in mabl Settings > API > API Keys. Generate a new key if needed.

checks.name: Code Changes
checks.description: Verifies Mabl automated tests are running to validate code changes

checks.name: Secure Code
checks.description: Verifies Mabl test plans are configured for continuous quality assurance
